info.name: Spareparts API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Spareparts management system.

Covers: Auth, Users, Stores, Warehouses, Roles, Permissions, Categories, Suppliers, Customers, Parts, Tax Rates, Invoice Templates, Company Settings, Audit Logs, Client Orders, Cart, Purchase Orders, Stock Transfers, Warehouse Stock, Stock Movements, Invoices, Payments, Returns, Credit Notes, and Refunds.

Access control uses permission-based authorities (e.g. hasAuthority('USER_VIEW')).

request.description: Returns the currently authenticated user. Requires: isAuthenticated()
List users assigned to a store. Requires: STORE_UPDATE
Assign a user to a store. Requires: STORE_UPDATE
Unassign a user from a store. Requires: STORE_UPDATE

request.description: List users assigned to a warehouse. Requires: WAREHOUSE_UPDATE
Assign a user to a warehouse. Requires: WAREHOUSE_UPDATE
Unassign a user from a warehouse. Requires: WAREHOUSE_UPDATE
Returns all permissions grouped by category. Requires: PERMISSION_VIEW
Returns WRITE, DELETE, and APPROVE level permissions. Requires: PERMISSION_VIEW
